creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ota from comment #2)
> vm.kmem_size="512m" # okay

In case of my VM, the autocalculated figure was around 400m. I set it to 256m and was able to complete "make buildworld -j5", which has been failing before.

Three years later, this is still a problem with FreeBSD-11.4-STABLE...
